#+TITLE: RRULE patterns
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 11111111-2222-3333-4444-aaaaaaaaaaaa
:END:

* TODO Weekly single-day Sunday
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-10 Sun ++1w>
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 22222222-2222-3333-4444-aaaaaaaaaaaa
:RRULE: FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU
:END:
Weekly anchored on a Sunday — cookie is lossless because the source date is a Sunday.

* TODO Weekly multi-day MO+WE
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-11 Mon ++1w>
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 33333333-2222-3333-4444-aaaaaaaaaaaa
:RRULE: FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO,WE
:END:
Multi-weekday — cookie is best-fit ++1w; canonical pattern lives in the property drawer.

* TODO Monthly first-of-month
SCHEDULED: <2026-06-01 Mon ++1m>
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 44444444-2222-3333-4444-aaaaaaaaaaaa
:RRULE: FREQ=MONTHLY;BYMONTHDAY=1
:END:
Monthly day-of-month — cookie ++1m, canonical via :RRULE:.

* TODO Daily every three days
SCHEDULED: <2026-05-10 Sun ++3d>
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 55555555-2222-3333-4444-aaaaaaaaaaaa
:RRULE: FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=3
:END:
Daily with interval — both cookie and RRULE express it.
